articles.title: Alex Cora ‘happy’ following Red Sox firing
articles.description:
Cora posted a smiling photo of himself and other fired assistant coaches on social media in the early morning hours.

The post Alex Cora ‘happy’ following Red Sox firing appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Sabastian Sawe of Kenya becomes first person to run a sub-2-hour marathon to win in London
articles.description:
In a huge, once-inconceivable moment in sports history, Sawe smashed the men’s world record by 65 seconds in winning the London Marathon in 1 hour, 59 minutes and 30 seconds on Sunday.

The post Sabastian Sawe of Kenya becomes first person to run a sub-2-hour marathon to win in London appeared first on Boston.com.
